mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM post_subscription WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comment_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM comment_subscription WHERE comment_id IN
#{cid}
